subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Sarah Herron et al in Dec. 1900
subcodes.first_line: Mohammed was the Advocate who was to come after Christ. Every Prophet was given of the spirit according to the conditions of the people
subcodes.subjects: @holy war [jihad]; violence in the name of God, @Christian doctrine and practice, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @station of the Manifestation of God, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures
